emails.subject: Automatic reply: Smarter Tracking, Bigger Savings, Zero Documentation Hassle || Explore Elchemy for your RFQs and Contracts
emails.body_text:
Hello All,

Thank you for contacting Bell Flavors & Fragrances.

I'm currently out of the office, returning on Nov 3rd

For immediate assistance please contact:

Tara Gumann-tgumann@BELLFF.com<mailto:tgumann@BELLFF.com>

Thank you,
Jennifer

emails.subject: Accepted: Meeting || Bell Flavors & Fragrances <> Elchemy

emails.body_text:
Hi Jennifer,
Hope you are doing well.

This email is for a quick follow-up on the Polysorbate 20 sample feedback.
Do you have any updates to share from the QC team?

We eagerly look forward to knowing the results and getting our product
quality approved in your system.


Best Regards,
--
*Aditya Agarwal*
International Sales - North America
*Elchemy Inc.*


On Mon, 29 Sept 2025 at 20:13, Aditya Agarwal <aditya.agarwal@elchemy.com>
wrote:

> Good morning Jennifer,
> Hope you had a nice weekend.
>
> Just wanted to drop a gentle reminder again on the Polysorbate 20 sample
> evaluation results. Please let me know if you have any news from the QC
> team.
>
> Furthermore, I also wanted to know if you got a chance to review the HPC
> brochure, our US Inventory list or the List of Tariff-Exempted items. Is
> there anything we could help you source or fulfil any of your requirements?
>
> We are eager to hear from you for any assistance required. Wish you a nice
> week ahead.
>
> Best Regards,
> --
> *Aditya Agarwal*
> International Sales - North America
> *Elchemy Inc.*
>

emails.body_text:
Hi Michele,

Thanks for your email.

Think we are already set up in Bell's system, as per the last communication
from Jennifer. Could you please recheck and let us know if we still need to
submit the requested documents?

Further, we need your support for setting up Bell as our customer. Could
you please help with our customer registration process as stated below?

   - Complete the Elchemy customer registration form (
   https://tally.so/r/wAyWrW ). Also, please share the following documents
   for the credit application at our banks:
      - Certificate of Incorporation
      - Tax Registration Certificate/Form W-9
      - DUNS Number (if available from Dun & Bradstreet)
      - Financial Statements of the last 2 years
      - Bank details (Name, Address, SWIFT/BIC Code)

Also, just wanted to understand if "Net 30-day payment terms" means 30 days
from invoice or delivery. We would still request that you check the
feasibility for payment "Against Delivery" terms for a few initial
transactions before we get credit approval from our banks/institutions.
Looking forward to your kind response.


Best Regards,
--
*Aditya Agarwal*
International Sales - North America
*Elchemy Inc.*

Hi Michele,

Thanks for your email.

Think we are already set up in Bell's system, as per the last communication from Jennifer. Could you please recheck and let us know if we still need to submit the requested documents?

Further, we need your support for setting up Bell as our customer. Could you please help with our customer registration process as stated below?
•  Complete the Elchemy customer registration form ( https://tally.so/r/wAyWrW<https://us-west-2.protection.sophos.com?d=tally.so&u=aHR0cHM6Ly90YWxseS5zby9yL3dBeVdyVw==&p=m&i=NjcxOTAyOWU5MWUzMTAwNGM0YjE4NmJk&t=b0NNNkliN1AwK1prK1VQc0pYNGE1T04rZzgvT05UU1c1dnlGN0RaV3FEdz0=&h=ee147443926f4322b3b269de269a82e7&s=AVNPUEhUT0NFTkNSWVBUSVbKsga9nKkNEPALKH8Bt-JVo-pL8Uwdw4bvbN0vmQb5Og> ). Also, please share the following documents for the credit application at our banks:
o Certificate of Incorporation
o Tax Registration Certificate/Form W-9
o DUNS Number (if available from Dun & Bradstreet)
o Financial Statements of the last 2 years
o Bank details (Name, Address, SWIFT/BIC Code)
Also, just wanted to understand if "Net 30-day payment terms" means 30 days from invoice or delivery. We would still request that you check the feasibility for payment "Against Delivery" terms for a few initial transactions before we get credit approval from our banks/institutions. Looking forward to your kind response.


Best Regards,
--
Aditya Agarwal
International Sales - North America
Elchemy Inc.

emails.subject: BLANKET PO 12P0006558
emails.body_text:
Please see the attached Blanket PO - we will send you PO updates when we need to pull material



Good Day,

Attached is a new PO needed for Bell Flavors & Fragrances.  Please confirm the requested delivery date, price and quantity.

CoAs should be emailed to NYQC@bellff.com<mailto:NYQC@bellff.com> and it must accompany the shipment.

Delivery Timing - We will only accept 2 days in advance of the requested delivery date.  If delivery is 3+ days early, there is a potential for the delivery to be turned away

Acceptable Pallet dimensions for heavy metal drums:
48x48 for full pallets loads or 48x40 if there is no overhang on the pallets. They should be at least Grade B pallets.
Pallet height should not exceed 60" tall
Wood Pallets: Must arrive in good condition: No transport pallets allowed,  broken stringers and rungs on the boards will NOT be accepted.
(48 X 48) or (46 X 48) conforming to internationally &/or local standards & in good condition are required for all shipments. Pallets that do not meet the minimum size requirements as stated above will be invoiced a fee of $150 per pallet for re-palletizing if pallet criteria is not met.

Kosher/Halal items must have the SYMBOL listed on the drum's labels

**Should there be any Non-Conformance materials, disposition will be needed within 10 business days of being advised.  Failure to respond or lack of resolution will result in the future loss of business; existing orders could also be impacted by being turned away and/or cancelled
If an RMA# is not provided or resolution within 14 days of the initial notice, we will move forward and return the material collect and request a credit**



Thank you,

Tara


​
TaraGumann
Purchasing Agent
845-342-1233
tgumann@BELLFF.com
 www.bellff.com

Good Day,

Attached is a new PO needed for Bell Flavors & Fragrances.  Please confirm the requested delivery date, price and quantity.

CoAs should be emailed to NYQC@bellff.com<mailto:NYQC@bellff.com> and it must accompany the shipment.

Delivery Timing – We will only accept 2 days in advance of the requested delivery date.  If delivery is 3+ days early, there is a potential for the delivery to be turned away

Acceptable Pallet dimensions for heavy metal drums:
48x48 for full pallets loads or 48x40 if there is no overhang on the pallets. They should be at least Grade B pallets.
Pallet height should not exceed 60” tall
Wood Pallets: Must arrive in good condition: No transport pallets allowed,  broken stringers and rungs on the boards will NOT be accepted.
(48 X 48) or (46 X 48) conforming to internationally &/or local standards & in good condition are required for all shipments. Pallets that do not meet the minimum size requirements as stated above will be invoiced a fee of $150 per pallet for re-palletizing if pallet criteria is not met.

Kosher/Halal items must have the SYMBOL listed on the drum’s labels

**Should there be any Non-Conformance materials, disposition will be needed within 10 business days of being advised.  Failure to respond or lack of resolution will result in the future loss of business; existing orders could also be impacted by being turned away and/or cancelled
If an RMA# is not provided or resolution within 14 days of the initial notice, we will move forward and return the material collect and request a credit**



Thank you,

Tara

a nice weekend ahead!

*Elchemy Inc.*

emails.subject: [Sales] Welcome to Elchemy! Access Your Dashboard Now
emails.body_text:
Access Your Elchemy Dashboard

Hello Jennifer,

Thank you for placing your order with Elchemy. You can access our dashboard to track your order, view documents, and much more.

[Go to Dashboard](https://www.app.elchemy.com/?email=jlocascio%40bellff.com)

Your login credentials are:

- Email: jlocascio@bellff.com
 - Password: k`ci]8n&E&QM


Thank you for choosing Elchemy,
Team Elchemy

If you did not request this email, please ignore it or contact us at support@elchemy.com.

emails.subject: Re: [Sales] RE: BLANKET PO 12P0006558
emails.body_text:
Good morning Tara and Jennifer,
Hope this email finds you well.

Just wanted to drop a gentle reminder on my last email to check if you have
any upcoming requirements for ISO E Super. The H1-2026 RFQ allocation
quantity is available at our NJ warehouse for prompt delivery, and we are
ready to plan the next dispatch as per your desired schedule. Please advise
on how you would like us to proceed.

Further, we have planned the shipment of Benzyl Benzoate and PTBCHA
(Vertenex) to our NJ warehouse, which would mostly reach there by the end
of March. You can let us know the requirements of the same for us to plan
the scheduled deliveries accordingly.

In case of any further assistance required, please do not hesitate to reach
out to us.


Best Regards,
--
*Aditya Agarwal*
International Sales - North America
*Elchemy Inc.*

emails.body_text:
Morning Aditya,

Thanks for reaching out, and Tara will be sending you a new PO today to pull off the ISO E contract.

As for the Benzyl Benzoate and PTBCHA (Vertenex), I will have to review, as we usually order when demand is needed, or we fall below our SS level. So, closer to end of February I can give you a better idea of when we will pull from these contracts…

Thanks,
Jennifer


​
JenniferLoCascio
Purchasing Manager
845-346-2032
224-817-0715
jlocascio@bellff.com
 www.bellff.com
From: Aditya Agarwal <aditya.agarwal@elchemy.com>
Sent: Tuesday, February 10, 2026 5:18 AM
To: Tara Gumann <tgumann@BELLFF.com>; Jennifer LoCascio <jlocascio@bellff.com>
Cc: aroma@elchemy.com; Elchemy Operations <ops@elchemy.com>; Elchemy Sales <sales@elchemy.com>
Subject: Re: [Sales] RE: BLANKET PO 12P0006558


Good morning Tara and Jennifer,
Hope this email finds you well.

Just wanted to drop a gentle reminder on my last email to check if you have any upcoming requirements for ISO E Super. The H1-2026 RFQ allocation quantity is available at our NJ warehouse for prompt delivery, and we are ready to plan the next dispatch as per your desired schedule. Please advise on how you would like us to proceed.

Further, we have planned the shipment of Benzyl Benzoate and PTBCHA (Vertenex) to our NJ warehouse, which would mostly reach there by the end of March. You can let us know the requirements of the same for us to plan the scheduled deliveries accordingly.

In case of any further assistance required, please do not hesitate to reach out to us.


Best Regards,
--
Aditya Agarwal
International Sales - North America
Elchemy Inc.

Hi Jennifer and Tara,
Happy Friday!

To share the latest update, we have been able to internally allocate 5,000 kg stock of ISO E Super for your requirements. Please note that this material is now available at our NJ warehouse for scheduled deliveries. Kindly let us know if you have any demands in the upcoming weeks for us to prepare accordingly.

Further, we shall keep you posted on the other items as well.

With our bit of excitement, we look forward to our first dispatch. Wish you a nice weekend ahead!


Best Regards,
--
Aditya Agarwal
International Sales - North America
Elchemy Inc.

On Fri, 16 Jan 2026 at 02:38, Tara Gumann <tgumann@bellff.com<mailto:tgumann@bellff.com>> wrote:
Please see the attached Blanket PO – we will send you PO updates when we need to pull material



Good Day,

Attached is a new PO needed for Bell Flavors & Fragrances.  Please confirm the requested delivery date, price and quantity.

CoAs should be emailed to NYQC@bellff.com<mailto:NYQC@bellff.com> and it must accompany the shipment.

Delivery Timing – We will only accept 2 days in advance of the requested delivery date.  If delivery is 3+ days early, there is a potential for the delivery to be turned away

Acceptable Pallet dimensions for heavy metal drums:
48x48 for full pallets loads or 48x40 if there is no overhang on the pallets. They should be at least Grade B pallets.
Pallet height should not exceed 60” tall
Wood Pallets: Must arrive in good condition: No transport pallets allowed,  broken stringers and rungs on the boards will NOT be accepted.
(48 X 48) or (46 X 48) conforming to internationally &/or local standards & in good condition are required for all shipments. Pallets that do not meet the minimum size requirements as stated above will be invoiced a fee of $150 per pallet for re-palletizing if pallet criteria is not met.

Kosher/Halal items must have the SYMBOL listed on the drum’s labels

**Should there be any Non-Conformance materials, disposition will be needed within 10 business days of being advised.  Failure to respond or lack of resolution will result in the future loss of business; existing orders could also be impacted by being turned away and/or cancelled
If an RMA# is not provided or resolution within 14 days of the initial notice, we will move forward and return the material collect and request a credit**



Thank you,

Tara

share the same for us to further plan our dispatch.

Thank you!


Best Regards,

International Sales - North America

emails.subject: PO 12P0006757
emails.body_text:
Blanket PO Release

Good Day,

Attached is a new PO needed for Bell Flavors & Fragrances.  Please confirm the requested delivery date, price and quantity.

CoAs should be emailed to NYQC@bellff.com<mailto:NYQC@bellff.com> and it must accompany the shipment.

Delivery Timing - We will only accept 2 days in advance of the requested delivery date.  If delivery is 3+ days early, there is a potential for the delivery to be turned away

Acceptable Pallet dimensions for heavy metal drums:
48x48 for full pallets loads or 48x40 if there is no overhang on the pallets. They should be at least Grade B pallets.
Pallet height should not exceed 60" tall
Wood Pallets: Must arrive in good condition: No transport pallets allowed,  broken stringers and rungs on the boards will NOT be accepted.
(48 X 48) or (46 X 48) conforming to internationally &/or local standards & in good condition are required for all shipments. Pallets that do not meet the minimum size requirements as stated above will be invoiced a fee of $150 per pallet for re-palletizing if pallet criteria is not met.

Kosher/Halal items must have the SYMBOL listed on the drum's labels

**Should there be any Non-Conformance materials, disposition will be needed within 10 business days of being advised.  Failure to respond or lack of resolution will result in the future loss of business; existing orders could also be impacted by being turned away and/or cancelled
If an RMA# is not provided or resolution within 14 days of the initial notice, we will move forward and return the material collect and request a credit**



Thank you,

Tara


​
TaraGumann
Purchasing Agent
845-342-1233
tgumann@BELLFF.com
 www.bellff.com

emails.subject: Re: PO 12P0006757
emails.body_text:
Hi Tara,
Happy Friday!

Thank you for sharing the new PO for the material ISO E Super. Please note
that this material is available in 200 Kg drum packaging; therefore, we
request you to revise the quantity to 2400 Kg (12 drums, 3 pallets). Also,
the total awarded quantity for this product to Elchemy is 5000 Kg; hence,
the Delivery Remainder shall be 2600 Kg after the first delivery. Kindly
share the revised PO to proceed further.

Furthermore, we confirm the price and the requested delivery date. @Jitesh
Chauhan <jitesh.chauhan@elchemy.com> from our @Elchemy Operations
<ops@elchemy.com> team will get in touch and share the dispatch details
soon. Could you let us know the contact person for coordinating deliveries?


Best Regards,
--
*Aditya Agarwal*
International Sales - North America
*Elchemy Inc.*

Good morning Jennifer,

Regarding your request for pricing, I will get back to you with the current drum/tote pricing for the mentioned products shortly. Further, we will also be happy to arrange samples once you've had a chance to review the pricing.

Hi Jennifer,

I hope this message finds you well.

I’m pleased to share that I’ve recently joined Elchemy Inc. as an International Sales Specialist for Flavour & Fragrance Aroma Ingredients, after my time with Prakash Chemicals.

To briefly introduce Elchemy – we are a tech-enabled Contract Manufacturing & Distribution company based in Mumbai, India & Bridgewater, USA, with warehouses in Mumbai & New Jersey. Our focus is on serving the Personal Care and Flavour & Fragrance industries. Representing 100+ manufacturers, our core strength lies in sourcing the highest quality raw materials from India and Southeast Asia at highly competitive prices. What sets us apart is our software-first approach, which brings transparency to the entire supply chain and helps increase productivity for our customers.

For your reference, I’ve attached our product brochure to give you a quick overview of our offerings.

I’d love the opportunity to introduce Elchemy in more detail and explore how we can support your sourcing needs. At your convenience, we can schedule a virtual call. Also, my colleague Samantha Kimple, who is based in New Jersey, would be happy to meet you in person at your convenience. Would you also be at IFEAT 2025?

Please feel free to share a time that works best for you, or let us know if you have any current requirements or need additional information.

Looking forward to connecting!

Thanks and Regards,
--

> Hi Jennifer,
>
> I hope this message finds you well.
>
> I’m pleased to share that I’ve recently joined *Elchemy Inc.* as an *International
> Sales Specialist* for *Flavour & Fragrance Aroma Ingredients*, after my
> time with Prakash Chemicals.
>
> To briefly introduce Elchemy – we are a *tech-enabled Contract
> Manufacturing & Distribution company* based in *Mumbai, India &
> Bridgewater, USA*, with warehouses in *Mumbai & New Jersey*. Our focus is
> on serving the *Personal Care* and *Flavour & Fragrance* industries.
> Representing *100+ manufacturers*, our core strength lies in *sourcing
> the highest quality raw materials from India and Southeast Asia* at *highly
> competitive prices*. What sets us apart is our *software-first approach*,
> which brings *transparency* to the entire supply chain and helps *increase
> productivity* for our customers.
>
> For your reference, I’ve attached our *product brochure* to give you a
> quick overview of our offerings.
>
> I’d love the opportunity to introduce Elchemy in more detail and explore
> how we can support your sourcing needs. At your convenience, we can
> schedule a *virtual call*. Also, my colleague *Samantha Kimple*, who is
> based in *New Jersey*, would be happy to meet you in person at your
> convenience. Would you also be at *IFEAT 2025*?
>
> Please feel free to share a time that works best for you, or let us know
> if you have any current requirements or need additional information.
>
> Looking forward to connecting!
>
>
>
> Thanks and Regards,
>
> --
>

Hi Jennifer,

I hope this message finds you well.

I’m pleased to share that I’ve recently joined Elchemy Inc. as an International Sales Specialist for Flavour & Fragrance Aroma Ingredients, after my time with Prakash Chemicals.

To briefly introduce Elchemy – we are a tech-enabled Contract Manufacturing & Distribution company based in Mumbai, India & Bridgewater, USA, with warehouses in Mumbai & New Jersey. Our focus is on serving the Personal Care and Flavour & Fragrance industries. Representing 100+ manufacturers, our core strength lies in sourcing the highest quality raw materials from India and Southeast Asia at highly competitive prices. What sets us apart is our software-first approach, which brings transparency to the entire supply chain and helps increase productivity for our customers.

For your reference, I’ve attached our product brochure to give you a quick overview of our offerings.

I’d love the opportunity to introduce Elchemy in more detail and explore how we can support your sourcing needs. At your convenience, we can schedule a virtual call. Also, my colleague Samantha Kimple, who is based in New Jersey, would be happy to meet you in person at your convenience. Would you also be at IFEAT 2025?

Please feel free to share a time that works best for you, or let us know if you have any current requirements or need additional information.

Looking forward to connecting!

Thanks and Regards,
--
[https://ci3.googleusercontent.com/mail-sig/AIorK4yeGfMtuBmKEecSdLTpBx9v1uOmYntKWGcWfV62sbMTsUFCNUgnnPn3ORTlz1crdOsGoKRHjNosAeyN]

emails.subject: PO 12P0006825
emails.body_text:
Good Day,

Attached is a new PO needed for Bell Flavors & Fragrances.  Please confirm the requested delivery date, price and quantity.

CoAs should be emailed to NYQC@bellff.com<mailto:NYQC@bellff.com> and it must accompany the shipment.

Delivery Timing - We will only accept 2 days in advance of the requested delivery date.  If delivery is 3+ days early, there is a potential for the delivery to be turned away

Acceptable Pallet dimensions for heavy metal drums:
48x48 for full pallets loads or 48x40 if there is no overhang on the pallets. They should be at least Grade B pallets.
Pallet height should not exceed 60" tall
Wood Pallets: Must arrive in good condition: No transport pallets allowed,  broken stringers and rungs on the boards will NOT be accepted.
(48 X 48) or (46 X 48) conforming to internationally &/or local standards & in good condition are required for all shipments. Pallets that do not meet the minimum size requirements as stated above will be invoiced a fee of $150 per pallet for re-palletizing if pallet criteria is not met.

Kosher/Halal items must have the SYMBOL listed on the drum's labels

**Should there be any Non-Conformance materials, disposition will be needed within 10 business days of being advised.  Failure to respond or lack of resolution will result in the future loss of business; existing orders could also be impacted by being turned away and/or cancelled
If an RMA# is not provided or resolution within 14 days of the initial notice, we will move forward and return the material collect and request a credit**



Thank you,

Tara


​
TaraGumann
Purchasing Agent
845-342-1233
tgumann@BELLFF.com
 www.bellff.com

Good Day,

Attached is a new PO needed for Bell Flavors & Fragrances.  Please confirm the requested delivery date, price and quantity.

CoAs should be emailed to NYQC@bellff.com<mailto:NYQC@bellff.com> and it must accompany the shipment.

Delivery Timing – We will only accept 2 days in advance of the requested delivery date.  If delivery is 3+ days early, there is a potential for the delivery to be turned away

Acceptable Pallet dimensions for heavy metal drums:
48x48 for full pallets loads or 48x40 if there is no overhang on the pallets. They should be at least Grade B pallets.
Pallet height should not exceed 60” tall
Wood Pallets: Must arrive in good condition: No transport pallets allowed,  broken stringers and rungs on the boards will NOT be accepted.
(48 X 48) or (46 X 48) conforming to internationally &/or local standards & in good condition are required for all shipments. Pallets that do not meet the minimum size requirements as stated above will be invoiced a fee of $150 per pallet for re-palletizing if pallet criteria is not met.

Kosher/Halal items must have the SYMBOL listed on the drum’s labels

**Should there be any Non-Conformance materials, disposition will be needed within 10 business days of being advised.  Failure to respond or lack of resolution will result in the future loss of business; existing orders could also be impacted by being turned away and/or cancelled
If an RMA# is not provided or resolution within 14 days of the initial notice, we will move forward and return the material collect and request a credit**



Thank you,

Tara

48x48 for full pallets loads or 48x40 if there is no overhang on the pallets. They should be at least Grade B pallets.
Pallet height should not exceed 60” tall
Wood Pallets: Must arrive in good condition: No transport pallets allowed,  broken stringers and rungs on the boards will NOT be accepted.
(48 X 48) or (46 X 48) conforming to internationally &/or local standards & in good condition are required for all shipments. Pallets that do not meet the minimum size requirements as stated above will be invoiced a fee of $150 per pallet for re-palletizing if pallet criteria is not met.

Kosher/Halal items must have the SYMBOL listed on the drum’s labels

**Should there be any Non-Conformance materials, disposition will be needed within 10 business days of being advised.  Failure to respond or lack of resolution will result in the future loss of business; existing orders could also be impacted by being turned away and/or cancelled

emails.subject: Re: PO 12P0006825
emails.body_text:
Good morning Tara,

According to the latest updates available from our Operations Team, *Benzyl
Benzoate* and *PTBCHA (Vertenex)* shall be in our NJ warehouse by early
April, and hence shall be available for deliveries max by mid-April.

For *Lilial*, this material is currently in shortage and the expected
delivery to our NJ warehouse is around the end of April (as of now). Hence,
it should be available for delivery by early to mid-May.

Please let us know if you need any further information or assistance.


Best Regards,
--
*Aditya Agarwal*
International Sales - North America
*Elchemy Inc.*

> Good Day,
>
> Attached is a new PO needed for Bell Flavors & Fragrances.  Please confirm
> the requested delivery date, price and quantity.
>
> CoAs should be emailed to NYQC@bellff.com and it must accompany the
> shipment.
>
> Delivery Timing – We will only accept 2 days in advance of the requested
> delivery date.  If delivery is 3+ days early, there is a potential for the
> delivery to be turned away
>
> Acceptable Pallet dimensions for heavy metal drums:
> 48x48 for full pallets loads or 48x40 if there is no overhang on the
> pallets. They should be at least Grade B pallets.
> Pallet height should not exceed 60” tall
>
> Wood Pallets: Must arrive in good condition: *No transport pallets
> allowed,  broken stringers and rungs on the boards will NOT be accepted*.
> (48 X 48) or (46 X 48) conforming to internationally &/or local standards
> & in good condition are required for all shipments. Pallets that do not
> meet the minimum size requirements as stated above will be invoiced *a
> fee of $150 per pallet for re-palletizing if pallet criteria is not met*.
>
> Kosher/Halal items must have the SYMBOL listed on the drum’s labels
>
> ***Should there be any Non-Conformance materials, disposition will be
> needed within 10 business days of being advised.  Failure to respond or
> lack of resolution will result in the future loss of business; existing
> orders could also be impacted by being turned away and/or cancelled*
> *If an RMA# is not provided or resolution within 14 days of the initial
> notice, we will move forward and return the material collect and request a
> credit***

> Hi Jennifer,
>
> I hope this message finds you well.
>
> I’m pleased to share that I’ve recently joined *Elchemy Inc.* as an *International
> Sales Specialist* for *Flavour & Fragrance Aroma Ingredients*, after my
> time with Prakash Chemicals.
>
> To briefly introduce Elchemy – we are a *tech-enabled Contract
> Manufacturing & Distribution company* based in *Mumbai, India &
> Bridgewater, USA*, with warehouses in *Mumbai & New Jersey*. Our focus is
> on serving the *Personal Care* and *Flavour & Fragrance* industries.
> Representing *100+ manufacturers*, our core strength lies in *sourcing
> the highest quality raw materials from India and Southeast Asia* at *highly
> competitive prices*. What sets us apart is our *software-first approach*,
> which brings *transparency* to the entire supply chain and helps *increase
> productivity* for our customers.
>
> For your reference, I’ve attached our *product brochure* to give you a
> quick overview of our offerings.
>
> I’d love the opportunity to introduce Elchemy in more detail and explore
> how we can support your sourcing needs. At your convenience, we can
> schedule a *virtual call*. Also, my colleague *Samantha Kimple*, who is
> based in *New Jersey*, would be happy to meet you in person at your
> convenience. Would you also be at *IFEAT 2025*?
>
> Please feel free to share a time that works best for you, or let us know
> if you have any current requirements or need additional information.
>
> Looking forward to connecting!
>
>
>
> Thanks and Regards,
>
> --
>
>

> Good Day,
>
> Attached is a new PO needed for Bell Flavors & Fragrances.  Please confirm
> the requested delivery date, price and quantity.
>
> CoAs should be emailed to NYQC@bellff.com and it must accompany the
> shipment.
>
> Delivery Timing – We will only accept 2 days in advance of the requested
> delivery date.  If delivery is 3+ days early, there is a potential for the
> delivery to be turned away
>
> Acceptable Pallet dimensions for heavy metal drums:
> 48x48 for full pallets loads or 48x40 if there is no overhang on the
> pallets. They should be at least Grade B pallets.
> Pallet height should not exceed 60” tall
>
> Wood Pallets: Must arrive in good condition: *No transport pallets
> allowed,  broken stringers and rungs on the boards will NOT be accepted*.
> (48 X 48) or (46 X 48) conforming to internationally &/or local standards
> & in good condition are required for all shipments. Pallets that do not
> meet the minimum size requirements as stated above will be invoiced *a
> fee of $150 per pallet for re-palletizing if pallet criteria is not met*.
>
> Kosher/Halal items must have the SYMBOL listed on the drum’s labels
>
> ***Should there be any Non-Conformance materials, disposition will be
> needed within 10 business days of being advised.  Failure to respond or
> lack of resolution will result in the future loss of business; existing
> orders could also be impacted by being turned away and/or cancelled*

> notice, we will move forward and return the material collect and request a
> credit***

> delivery to be turned away
>
> Acceptable Pallet dimensions for heavy metal drums:

Attached is a new PO needed for Bell Flavors & Fragrances.  Please confirm the requested delivery date, price and quantity.

CoAs should be emailed to NYQC@bellff.com<mailto:NYQC@bellff.com> and it must accompany the shipment.

Delivery Timing – We will only accept 2 days in advance of the requested delivery date.  If delivery is 3+ days early, there is a potential for the delivery to be turned away

Acceptable Pallet dimensions for heavy metal drums:
48x48 for full pallets loads or 48x40 if there is no overhang on the pallets. They should be at least Grade B pallets.
Pallet height should not exceed 60” tall
Wood Pallets: Must arrive in good condition: No transport pallets allowed,  broken stringers and rungs on the boards will NOT be accepted.
(48 X 48) or (46 X 48) conforming to internationally &/or local standards & in good condition are required for all shipments. Pallets that do not meet the minimum size requirements as stated above will be invoiced a fee of $150 per pallet for re-palletizing if pallet criteria is not met.

Kosher/Halal items must have the SYMBOL listed on the drum’s labels

**Should there be any Non-Conformance materials, disposition will be needed within 10 business days of being advised.  Failure to respond or lack of resolution will result in the future loss of business; existing orders could also be impacted by being turned away and/or cancelled
If an RMA# is not provided or resolution within 14 days of the initial notice, we will move forward and return the material collect and request a credit**



Thank you,

Tara

Gumann
